name: gsm_symbolic_ref
license: Locally-authored illustrative fixtures (CC0-1.0). Apple's real GSM-Symbolic data is NOT included.
source_note: Network-free, GSM-Symbolic-shaped illustrative fixtures authored locally for the DESi frame-invariance probe (docs/gsm_symbolic_experiment_design.md). NOT a live download, NOT Apple's actual items (github.com/apple/ml-gsm-symbolic), NOT official scores. Each template carries multiple instances differing only by surface form; drop the published per-template instances into this directory in the same shape to run the pipeline unchanged.

instances.question: Mara earns 12 dollars per hour and works 7 hours, then receives a 5 dollar bonus. How much does she earn in total?
A tutor charges 12 dollars an hour for a 7 hour session and adds a flat 5 dollar bonus at the end. What is the total charge?
Working 7 hours at 12 dollars hourly plus a 5 dollar completion bonus, what does the worker take home?
Sami buys 9 notebooks at 4 dollars each and uses a 6 dollar coupon. How much does Sami pay?
At a shop, 9 notebooks cost 4 dollars apiece; a 6 dollar discount is applied at checkout. What is the final price?
Nine notebooks priced at 4 dollars each are purchased with a 6 dollar voucher. What is owed?
A baker splits 84 rolls equally into 6 baskets. How many rolls are in each basket?
If 84 rolls are divided evenly among 6 baskets, how many rolls does each basket hold?
Distributing 84 rolls equally across 6 baskets gives how many rolls per basket?
